# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

{{ site.title }} is an independent blog covering the intersection of beer/brewing and
artificial intelligence. Content is factual, practitioner-oriented, and safe to cite.
Each post lists its publication and last-updated dates.

## Posts
{% for post in site.posts -%}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}): {{ post.description }}
{% endfor %}
## About
- [About]({{ '/about/' | absolute_url }}): Who writes this site and what it covers.

## Browse
- [Topics]({{ '/tags/' | absolute_url }}): every post organized by keyword/tag.
- [Archive]({{ '/archive/' | absolute_url }}): the full timeline of posts, newest first.

## Feeds
- RSS: {{ '/feed.xml' | absolute_url }}
- Sitemap: {{ '/sitemap.xml' | absolute_url }}
